Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 276 

TOT_BENE_DDCTBL_LBLTY_AMT 

LABEL: Total Beneficiary Deductible Liability Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The total deductible amount on a claim the beneficiary is obligated to pay for covered services. This 
amount is the total Medicaid or contract negotiated beneficiary deductible liability minus previous 
beneficiary payments that went toward their deductible. Do not subtract out any
